Another freemium model - I hope this isn't one of those fair monetization nightmares that forces payments just to progress through basic testing scenarios.
They're showing testimonials but I need to see if this actually delivers a seamless, error-free login experience because I can't waste time on another platform with persistent login loops.
This navigation is already confusing me and I'm technically savvy - if I can't figure out their core functionality quickly, how broken is their actual testing software going to be?
They want my email before showing pricing details, which usually means they know their compensation structure won't compete with platforms that actually pay fairly for completed work.
Finally, a tool that promises reliable core functionality for recording and saving - though I've heard that promise before from platforms that crashed constantly during actual testing sessions.
